meta.title: The Realignment - Ep. 15: Debating the Post-Syria Middle East
meta.description:
Hudson colleagues Michael Doran and Blaise Misztal join The Realignment for a wide-ranging debate on Syria, Turkey, the Kurds, and the state of the U.S. alliance system in the Middle East.

Subscribe to catch new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
